// changelog: Default simple changelog. NOT @changesets/changelog-github — we prefer hand-curated entries over auto-pulled PR titles. See docs/release/changesets-workflow.md.
// commit: false → committing changesets is the author's call; CI doesn't auto-commit.
// access: public → npm will accept publishes without --access flag. Flip back to restricted before 1.0 if we decide to stay unpublished.
